records.m_Talk_ENG: We both have our duties which we must exert all of our efforts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wir haben alle unsere Pflichten, denen wir nachkommen m9588ssen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That principle applies to all, whether it be the slave or the emperor.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Un principe qui s'applique 95p tous les individus de ce monde, qu'ils soient esclaves ou empereurs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, Sage, you and I are at antipodes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should we both continue to perform our duties unwaveringly, we will clash with each other one day.
